impact: This gives the daemon a deterministic recovery path after repeated malformed Python proposals: pause broad public-PDF fixture retries, constrain the next patch to one tiny syntax-valid file set, require parser checks before full validation, and keep supervisor repair separate from PP&D domain implementation so autonomous progress can resume safely.
summary: Strengthen PP&D supervisor repair guidance for repeated syntax-preflight loops without touching the stalled domain task.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 9 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
